Acting for Sustainable Development

at the heart of the Congo Basin

About AED

Action on Environment and Development (AED) is a non-profit organization working on environment and development, in collaboration with institutions of the Republic of the Congo, international institutions and development partners.

We take all initiatives for the harmonious development of populations by relying on actions related to environmental protection and sustainable development.

Dr LOUBAKI Eugène President of AED

Our Mission

Our Goals

AED contributes to the monitoring and implementation of national, regional and international legal instruments on environmental protection to which Congo is a party.

Institutional Visibility

Radiating at national and international scales

AED strengthens its presence with Congolese institutions, regional bodies and international development partners. We actively participate in global environmental conferences to represent Congo's interests and defend its multilateral commitments.

Our publications and studies
